description: GPT-2 Small shape: 12 layers 768 embd 12 heads (was 30x512x8)
torch.compile max-autotune (CUDA graphs conflict with grad accum)
WSD (warmup-stable-decay) LR schedule instead of cosine
QK-norm (RMSNorm on Q/K) - no improvement + adds complexity
14 layers (from 12) - slower steps outweigh extra capacity
cosine decay in WSD (instead of linear)
wider SwiGLU inner dim (1792 vs 1536) - slower per step
NS steps 5 -> 3 (same loss + more steps + simpler)
remove dpn norm with Muon (dpn still helps)
